'''bachubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zami|zami]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zami|zami]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bachubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæchibith|bæchibith]] || [[word:bæchibij|bæchibij]] || [[word:bæchibish|bæchibish]] || [[word:bæchibi|bæchibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachuchubuth|bachuchubuth]] || [[word:bachuchubuj|bachuchubuj]] || [[word:bachuchubush|bachuchubush]] || [[word:bachuchubu|bachuchubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachubuth|bachubuth]] || [[word:bachubuj|bachubuj]] || [[word:bachubush|bachubush]] || [[word:bachubu|bachubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachufbuth|bachufbuth]] || [[word:bachufbuj|bachufbuj]] || [[word:bachufbush|bachufbush]] || [[word:bachufbuf|bachufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bachubuthu|bachubuthu]] || [[word:bachubuju|bachubuju]] || [[word:bachubushu|bachubushu]] || [[word:bachubuku|bachubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bachubuth|bachubuth]] || [[word:bachubuj|bachubuj]] || [[word:bachubush|bachubush]] || [[word:bachubu|bachubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bachubuthul|bachubuthul]] || [[word:bachubujul|bachubujul]] || [[word:bachubushul|bachubushul]] || [[word:bachubukul|bachubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bachubuthuthu|bachubuthuthu]] || [[word:bachubujuju|bachubujuju]] || [[word:bachubushushu|bachubushushu]] || [[word:bachubuku|bachubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bachubuthun|bachubuthun]] || [[word:bachubujun|bachubujun]] || [[word:bachubushun|bachubushun]] || [[word:bachubukun|bachubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bachubuthuoro|bachubuthuoro]] || [[word:bachubujuoro|bachubujuoro]] || [[word:bachubushuoro|bachubushuoro]] || [[word:bachubukuoro|bachubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
